elements.title: lang::report_page_032_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.id,
       CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) as teacher,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ctx.instanceid)       as courses,
       SUM(l.learners)                      as learners,
       SUM(l1.activelearners)               as activelearners,
       SUM(cc.completed)                    as completedlearners,
       AVG(kbi_g.grade)                         as grade
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id AND
                            kbi_c.visible = 1
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, count(distinct kbi_ra.userid) as learners
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra, mdl_context kbi_ctx
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                    AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid) AS l ON l.instanceid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, count(distinct kbi_ra.userid) as activelearners
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra, mdl_user kbi_u, mdl_context kbi_ctx
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                    AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
                    AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
                    AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid) AS l1 ON l1.instanceid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, count(id) as completed
                  FROM mdl_course_completions
                  WHERE timecompleted > 0
                  GROUP BY course) cc ON cc.course = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.courseid,
                         ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                     WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                     ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade
                  FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi, mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
                  WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
                    AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
                    AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                  GROUP BY kbi_gi.courseid) g ON kbi_g.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_u.lastname
